description: Architecture — first wave. Subject IDs match this domain's lane id_patterns (ext_, int_, street_) so `sdlab generate` will route each candidate into the correct lane instead of default_lane.

defaults.negative: photorealistic, photograph, 3d render, smooth CG, sharp photo detail

subjects.prompt: oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR BUILDING — facade, elevation, architectural massing], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR INTERIOR — hall, chamber, spatial atmosphere], painterly concept art, canvas grain
oil painting, visible brushstrokes, [DESCRIBE YOUR STREETSCAPE — street-level view, urban fabric, district overview], painterly concept art, canvas grain
